B2B V2V London 2026

London's Most Exclusive PropTech Networking Event

Where real estate investors, technology leaders, and innovators converge at the summit of the capital.
Date Q3 2026
Venue The Shard, London SE1
Format Conference + VIP Networking
The Event

Where vision meets capital — above London

PropTech Connect brings together the decision-makers reshaping real estate: investors, developers, technology founders, and policy architects in a single day of intelligence and relationship-building.

The previous edition drew 100 industry leaders to a sold-out room. This edition — set on the floors of The Shard with panoramic views of London — targets 300 attendees and a step change in ambition. Every room is curated. Every session is actionable.

Real Estate Investment
Access deal flow, co-investment partners, and emerging market intelligence from active deployers across the UK and Europe.
PropTech Innovation
From AI-driven asset management to smart buildings — see what's being built, funded, and deployed right now.
Curated Networking
Structured and unstructured time with founders, investors, and operators who are actively shaping the market.
Strategic Insight
Keynotes and panels that go beyond trend-watching — bringing the commercial angle to every major theme.

Why Attend

Reasons executives choose PropTech Connect

Connect with 300+ senior professionals from real estate, investment, PropTech, construction and the wider Built Environment sector.

Gain insights from industry leaders, discover emerging technologies, discuss market trends and build relationships that can accelerate your business and career.

Senior-only rooms
Every attendee is vetted. No junior delegates, no filler. Rooms built for principals who move capital and close partnerships.
Emerging technologies
Discover what's being built, funded and deployed — from AI-driven asset management to smart buildings and beyond.
Investment pipeline
Structured investor showcases and curated introductions mean you leave with a pipeline, not just a contact list.
Market intelligence
Briefings on UK and European real estate, lending markets, asset repricing, and the operator strategies driving returns.
Career-accelerating connections
The right conversation with the right person can change your trajectory. This is a room where those conversations happen.
The Shard experience
A venue that signals the level of the event before the first session starts. 72 floors above London, the room does half the work.

About RealTimes

RealTimes is a media and events platform focused on people, projects, careers and innovation across the real estate industry. Through executive forums, networking events and industry insights, RealTimes creates opportunities for professionals to connect and share ideas.

PropTech Connect 2026

About the Event

Mission

The event London's real estate industry has been missing

PropTech Connect was created to close the gap between capital and technology in UK real estate. The industry has no shortage of conferences — but it has a shortage of rooms where investors, developers, and technology builders are in the same space with intent to act.

The 2026 edition at The Shard, London SE1 is a direct response to demand from the first cohort of 100 attendees who left with deals started and introductions that mattered.

Industry Context

The themes driving the agenda

Event Experience

What a day at PropTech Connect looks like

Morning Briefings
Keynote sessions from operators and investors with direct market exposure. Context, not commentary.
Curated Panels
Moderated discussions where speakers disagree productively and audiences leave with sharper views.
Technology Demos
Live demonstrations of AI, smart building, and investment tools from the companies building them.
Investor Meetings
Pre-arranged one-to-one sessions between founders seeking capital and investors actively deploying.
VIP Networking Floor
An exclusive evening networking session on the upper floors with curated introductions by the team.
Editorial Follow-Up
Post-event briefings and contact facilitation so the relationships you start don't stall on Monday.

The Venue

The Shard
London SE1

72 floors above London Bridge

The Building

Europe's most iconic address for a reason

Designed by Renzo Piano and completed in 2012, The Shard rises 309.6 metres above London — the UK's tallest building. Its glass-clad form has become the city's definitive marker of modern ambition.

PropTech Connect 2026 takes place across dedicated conference and networking floors with panoramic views of the Thames, the City, Canary Wharf, and the London skyline.

The Shard was chosen deliberately — a venue that signals to every attendee, before a single session begins, that this is not a standard conference.

◉
The Shard, London Bridge St, SE1 9SG
